error_signature: default value in the header auth section
title: Fal AI node not saving authorization key
symptom: The authorization key for the Fal AI node reverts to the default value after saving, indicating it was not properly saved.
not_this_if: Authorization key saves correctly in other nodes
root_cause: The Fal AI node requires a specific format for the authorization key. Using 'Bearer !key!' instead of 'Key !key!' causes the node to not recognize the input, leading to it reverting to the default value.
fix_steps: Open the Fal AI node settings
Change the authorization key format from 'Bearer !key!' to 'Key !key!'
Reopen the node to verify the key is saved correctly
agent_instruction: Change the authorization key format to 'Key !key!' and save the node.
